message:
test(scrollback): add 33 edge-case tests for Scrollback ring buffer (bd-33u5g)

Cover eviction return values and wrapped flag preservation,
capacity-1 push/evict cycle, Default trait, clone independence,
out-of-bounds get, set_capacity to zero/growing/same, empty cell push,
multiple eviction ordering, iter_range clamping (beyond-len, empty,
full, far-beyond), pop-all-then-push, peek-newest idempotency,
virtualized_window edge cases (empty/zero-viewport/zero-overscan/
max-offset/overscan-clamped/render-contains-viewport/single-line),
ScrollbackLine equality/clone, ScrollbackWindow copy semantics,
large capacity prealloc cap, clear-then-push, debug formats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
